name: HentaiCity
author: Community
payload: class Provider { getSettings() { return { episodeServers: ['Default'], supportsDub: false }; } async search(opts) { const res = await fetch(`https://www.hentaicity.com/search?keyword=${encodeURIComponent(opts.query)}`); const html = await res.text(); const $ = LoadDoc(html); const results = []; $('.video-item').each((_, el) => { const a = $(el).find('a').first(); results.push({ id: a.attr('href'), title: $(el).find('.title').text().trim(), url: `https://www.hentaicity.com${a.attr('href')}`, subOrDub: 'sub' }); }); return results; } async findEpisodes(id) { return [{ id: id, number: 1, title: 'Full Movie', url: `https://www.hentaicity.com${id}` }]; } async findEpisodeServer(episode) { const res = await fetch(episode.url); const html = await res.text(); const videoMatch = html.match(/file: "(.*?)"/i) || html.match(/source src=\"(.*?)\"/i); const videoUrl = videoMatch ? videoMatch[1].replace(/\\/g, '') : ''; return { server: 'Default', videoSources: [{ url: videoUrl, type: videoUrl.includes('m3u8') ? 'm3u8' : 'mp4', quality: '720p' }] }; } }
